languages.text: "Свидетельствую стойкость сих {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинных духов{/g}, в предсмертном хрипе исполняющих гимн функционирования".

traits.locale_text: "Свидетельствую стойкость сих {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинных духов{/g}, в предсмертном хрипе исполняющих гимн функционирования".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "I bear witness to the steadfastness of these {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."
languages.original_text: "Свидетельствую стойкость сих {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинных духов{/g}, в предсмертном хрипе исполняющих гимн функционирования".

traits.locale_text: "I bear witness to the steadfastness of these {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."
"I bear witness to the steadfastness of these machine spirits, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."
"I bear witness to the steadfastness of these machine spirits, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."

languages.text: 「機械の魂の固い意志を、死のうとする中でも機能の賛歌を歌い続ける姿に、私は証言する。」
languages.original_text: "I bear witness to the steadfastness of these machine spirits, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."

languages.text: "Ölüm sancıları çekerken bile işlev ilahilerini söyleyen bu {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhlarının{/g} metanetine tanıklık ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I bear witness to the steadfastness of these {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."

traits.locale_text: "Ölüm sancıları çekerken bile işlev ilahilerini söyleyen bu makine ruhlarının metanetine tanıklık ediyorum."

languages.text: “我再次见证了{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}的坚韧：即便在濒死之际，它们仍吟唱着功能礼赞。”
languages.original_text: "I bear witness to the steadfastness of these {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."

traits.locale_text: “我再次见证了机魂的坚韧：即便在濒死之际，它们仍吟唱着功能礼赞。”

languages.text: "Ich bezeuge die Standhaftigkeit dieser {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeister{/g}, die ihre Hymne des Funktionierens selbst in ihrem Todeskampf singen."
languages.original_text: "I bear witness to the steadfastness of these {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bezeuge die Standhaftigkeit dieser Maschinengeister, die ihre Hymne des Funktionierens selbst in ihrem Todeskampf singen."

languages.text: « Soyons tous témoins de la constance de ces {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g}, qui chantent leur hymne de fonctionnement même dans les affres de la mort. »
languages.original_text: "I bear witness to the steadfastness of these {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."

traits.locale_text: « Soyons tous témoins de la constance de ces esprits de la machine, qui chantent leur hymne de fonctionnement même dans les affres de la mort. »

languages.text: «Soy testigo de la firmeza de estos {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g}, que cantan el himno de sus funciones pese a la proximidad de sus muertes».
languages.original_text: "I bear witness to the steadfastness of these {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}, who sing their hymn of functioning even in their death throes."

traits.locale_text: «Soy testigo de la firmeza de estos espíritus máquina, que cantan el himno de sus funciones pese a la proximidad de sus muertes».
